title: wolftpm-tss: WolfTpmSwtpm not gated on swtpm feature
description: In wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs, WolfTpmSwtpm and its connect() method are unconditionally public with no #[cfg(feature="swtpm")] gate. wolfTPM must be compiled with --enable-swtpm for the struct to work; without it, wolfTPM2_Init silently fails at runtime with an opaque TPM error. By contrast, wolftpm/src/device.rs correctly gates Device::open_swtpm behind #[cfg(feature="swtpm")], so the compiler prevents calling it without the feature. The inconsistency means wolftpm-tss exposes a type that silently fails when swtpm is not in the feature set, while wolftpm gives a compile error for the same mistake. Fix: add #[cfg(feature="swtpm")] to WolfTpmSwtpm struct, its impl block, and the Connection impl.
